ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neural_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neural network */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neural network architecture */,
  "hidden_layers" TEXT /* Number and sizes of hidden layers */,
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization algorithm used */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the neural network */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used during training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* Input shape of the neural network */,
  "output_shape" TEXT /* Output shape of the neural network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neural_networks_architecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("architecture_id") REFERENCES architectures ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neural_networks_optimizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimizer_id") REFERENCES optimizers ("optimizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neural network being trained */,
  "max_iterations" INTEGER /* Maximum number of iterations */,
  "delta_x" REAL /* Delta x value */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "data_mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) on the data */,
  "grad_mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) on the gradient */,
  "training_mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) on the training data */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the training session started */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the training session ended */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken for the training session */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the training session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES neural_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "architecture_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the architecture was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizers" (
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimizer */,
  "optimizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimizer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the optimizer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the optimizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter tuning session */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neural network being tuned */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter being tuned */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter being tuned */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the neural network with the tuned hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the hyperparameter tuning session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the hyperparameter tuning session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES neural_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the project member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
